description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular, box-like enclosure with a sleek black finish. The front face is dominated by two large circular speaker drivers flanking a smaller central tweeter, all set behind a subtle grille. The enclosure appears to be constructed from a combination of plastic and possibly wood or MDF, with a smooth, slightly glossy surface. The rear side includes two circular ports, likely for bass reflex, but no visible control panel or display screen. The top, sides, and back are unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist, modern design. A small, square emblem or logo is present on the lower front panel, adding a touch of branding.
description: A sleek, black rectangular stereo sound system with two large front-facing speakers, a central tweeter, and a minimalist design. The front features a small logo, while the back has two circular ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large speaker drivers, a central tweeter, and a small logo at the bottom center.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, unadorned black side panel of the enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing two circular bass reflex ports and a plain back surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a smooth, featureless black panel.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, square logo or emblem is visible on the lower center of the front panel; details are not readable.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles are circular and appear to have a fine mesh or perforated pattern, typical of modern speaker designs, with no additional decorative elements.
